The plugin was previously configured on **hotspan.com**, but since the address has now been updated to **labs.hotspan.com**, the configuration needs to be applied to the new URL as well.

Marietta, GA 30067

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1776242307983879

US Customer using WSS with FedEx and UPS for rates on checkout. Customer is on Popular plan.
**Case - **
Rates on checkout not available from the plugin.
No new logs are getting created in the plugin after April 3rd.

**Checks Done - **

- **WP-JSON:** Giving positive response.
- **Debugger:** Everything OK.
- **Realtime Rates:** Active
- **Rate Automation rules in plugin:** Created and correct.
- **Webhooks:** Found duplicates. Cleared all and resynced the plugin to create fresh webhooks without duplicates.

Need assistance from team to check the case and identify why the logs in the plugin are not getting created.

**Admin Login - **
https://labs.hotspan.com/wp-admin/
admin
cVe9VNfk^wVm1b&Zv4%i@&h

URL - https://labs.hotspan.com
Account ID - f0d50c73-64c6-45bc-83fc-7c7b796e416f

comments.body: Your responses are taking too long, which makes it seem like the client’s concerns aren’t being treated with urgency.
comments.html_body: Your responses are taking too long, which makes it seem like the client’s concerns aren’t being treated with urgency.
comments.plain_body: Your responses are taking too long, which makes it seem like the client’s concerns aren’t being treated with urgency.

comments.body:
Hello Pankaj,

We do understand your concern and the case is being addressed on priority.

Your case has been escalated further to the senior team as it seems like some setup on your store is blocking the data from reaching to our plugin. As our plugin is not receiving any rate requests from your checkout, the rates are not being returned.

Our team is investigating the case to find the root cause so that it can be addressed as needed.

We will update you as soon as possible.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Pankaj,
 
We do understand your concern and the case is being addressed on priority.
 
Your case has been escalated further to the senior team as it seems like some setup on your store is blocking the data from reaching to our plugin. As our plugin is not receiving any rate requests from your checkout, the rates are not being returned.
 
Our team is investigating the case to find the root cause so that it can be addressed as needed.
 
We will update you as soon as possible.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
What was the issue before, still if made any changes it's not not reflecting i have selected 3 shipping service but it showing only 2 for fedex
 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/qqoI8pwnIa5IAeuMhTf78l1Wg/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body: What was the issue before, still if made any changes it's not not reflecting i have selected 3 shipping service but it showing only 2 for fedex
comments.plain_body: What was the issue before, still if made any changes it's not not reflecting i have selected 3 shipping service but it showing only 2 for fedex

comments.body:
Hello Jeff,

The **FedEx 3Day Freight** shipping option is not applicable for lightweight shipments. As such, it will not be available for your transaction.

Please note that any FedEx service with **Freight** in its name, is available for shipping Freight shipment (heavy and large, generally above 150 lbs), and the FedEx account should be specifically enabled for such services.

Additionally, only the applicable services will be returned for a transaction even if you enable all the services in the plugin.

Please cross check and let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Jeff,
 
The FedEx 3Day Freight shipping option is not applicable for lightweight shipments. As such, it will not be available for your transaction.
 
Please note that any FedEx service with Freight in its name, is available for shipping Freight shipment (heavy and large, generally above 150 lbs), and the FedEx account should be specifically enabled for such services.
 
Additionally, only the applicable services will be returned for a transaction even if you enable all the services in the plugin.
 
Please cross check and let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
